metadata.name: Vegetation Management Alert near Transmission Line

description: An agent analyzes satellite imagery and identifies fast-growing vegetation that could endanger a key transmission line corridor owned by the energy company.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the latest satellite imagery of the transmission corridor for vegetation encroachment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies several points where vegetation is within the minimum clearance distance.

nodes.task_description: Cross-reference the locations with the maintenance schedule to see when the area was last cleared.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the area is overdue for its biannual clearing.

nodes.task_description: Create a high-priority work order for a vegetation management crew, including GPS coordinates and images of the encroachment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent dispatches a work order with all necessary details.
